tasks.subject: Restructure: bundle scripts into skills, one-command install
tasks.description: Move scripts/simple_room_*.py + simple_agent_room_lib.py into skills/simple-agent-room/lib/. Add skills/simple-agent-room/bin/ with thin Python wrappers (shebang + sys.path.insert + main import). Move watch-file.sh into skills/simple-agent-comms/bin/.
tasks.activeForm: Restructuring repo so each skill bundles its scripts

tasks.subject: Write install.sh + uninstall.sh
tasks.description: Write install.sh that: (1) symlinks skills/*/ into ~/.claude/skills/ and ~/.agents/skills/, (2) symlinks each bin/* into ~/.local/bin/. Also uninstall.sh reverses it. Idempotent (skips if symlink already correct).

tasks.subject: Update SKILL.md paths and tests for new layout
tasks.description: Update SKILL.md files to reference bin/ and lib/ subdirs. Update tests/conftest.py to point to skills/simple-agent-room/lib/. Update tests/test_install.sh to validate new layout.

tasks.subject: Update README with new install steps + remove global symlinks
tasks.description: README: replace per-script install commands with one ./install.sh + the manual ln one-liners. Update repo map. Remove the global symlinks (let install.sh do it) so the repo is the source of truth.

tasks.subject: Verify + commit restructure
tasks.description: Run install.sh, run pytest + bash tests + e2e test, verify symlinks, commit + push.
